infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SafeReturn needs camera access to capture missing person photos for reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SafeReturn needs photo library access to upload missing person photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeReturn needs your live location to add the last seen location in reports.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SafeReturn needs microphone access so you can ask the AI assistant using voice input.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow SafeReturn to access your photos so you can upload missing person photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SafeReturn to use your camera so you can capture missing person photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow SafeReturn to use your location to attach live location to reports.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow SafeReturn to use your location to attach live location to reports.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow SafeReturn to access your microphone so you can use voice input in AI chat.
